name: python-lsp
description: Real-time Python code intelligence for Claude — type errors, go-to-definition, find references, and hover via Pyright language server.

pillars.supervised: Fully autonomous — read-only code analysis, no external calls or side effects
pillars.orchestrated: LSP protocol handles type diagnostics, navigation, and hover automatically on file changes
pillars.secured: No credentials, no network access, no file writes — pure static analysis via local pyright binary
